pipeline.desc: The full content chain (topics -> writer -> grader gate -> visuals -> approval/schedule -> reporter). SOLE content entry point - the granular entries below exist for manual runs and experiments, not for scheduling alongside this.

scout.desc: Research collector: mines trending/outlier content across platforms into the research tabs.

maker.desc: Content writer: turns new research signals into on-brand content packages awaiting review (emails an approval request).

grader.desc: Quality gate over pending packages: grades vs the brand-voice spec; ship/fix/reject thresholds with one rewrite pass.

publisher-queue.desc: Approval poller: reads the operator's email replies; ONLY on an explicit approval does it invoke the scheduler. This is the manual-approval flow — the one path that can publish.

analyst.desc: Weekly analyst: what posted, what performed, attributed conversions, subscriber delta, exactly one recommended adjustment. Also scores experiments and drafts spawn manifests on threshold signals.

brand-voice.desc: Weekly brand-voice maintainer: keeps the voice spec fresh and scans recent output for drift.
